query:
SELECT id, title, image_path, console FROM roms
         WHERE (
             title ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
             OR serial ILIKE $1 || '%'
         )
         AND (category = $2 OR $2 IS NULL)
         AND (console = $3 OR $3 IS NULL)
         ORDER BY
             CASE WHEN serial ILIKE $1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
             title ASC
         LIMIT $4 OFFSET $5
